name: global dry-run: /plugin-install --dry-run validates manifest without cloning or registering
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" --github-org acme --repo eslint-plugin-foo --dry-run && [ -z "$(ls -A .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/ 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo ok 1>&2
